_comment: Full-bleed biome scene backdrops (ADR 0012 addendum: chooser + scenes). One object per zone, one sub-object per scene band (far/mid/ground/fore) on the 1024x640 canvas. Art direction: WoW-meadow x Nintendo softness -- rolling hill bands, drifting wildflower meadows, soft distant treeline, big readable painterly shapes; seeded wobble keeps silhouettes organic, 2-stop gradients give form, alpha haze carries depth. Tune HERE and rerun generate_backdrops.mjs -- never hand-edit svg/.
